reviews.author: Charu Kumar
reviews.review_body: I wish i could rate the school in minus. PLS don't blindly go by the dps name and fall in their trap. The biggest looters and theives. This is not an education imparting school, its a money making business model, by just looting people's hard earned money. My child studied here till 8th beginning because we were now getting transferred to Delhi. My child attended school only for 20 days in the month of April. His last working day was 21st April 2023. But the school has charged us full 1st term fees from April till July. I informed them on 5th june that we have got transferred and i would like to apply for TC. I requested for refund,  which was denied saying that even if ur child attended 2 days of school in the beginning of the session, you will have to pay the full term fees. I mean how illogical is that?? When the child is not attending even a single day in June and July, how can they charge fees for those months?  I even suggested that they could take the fees of summer vacation month but why June and July? Also, I would like to highlight here, the way parents are burdened by the school to buy specific brand shoes etc. every year like puma, or Nike shoes only, as per their tie up with the particular brand. My sincere advise to parents seeking admission in dps Secunderabad.  Pls refrain from this school where education is not important but these things are above all that. They have also not refunded my caution money till now. Which is actually a refundable amount as per them.

reviews.author: Theja Kondapalli
reviews.review_body: It's a great school available for those aspiring to have a good career in life, with all good facilities available for children .

reviews.author: Gouthami Thota
reviews.review_body:
I've joined my kid in class 1 this year in 2023... Till now the experience has been that grateful...
Conducting ONLINE classes for class 1!!!! The reason they quoted is SUMMER!
When all the schools in Hyderabad are running offline.. This is the only School that runs ONLINE classes before and after Summer break....

It becomes very tough for working parents to get leaves for making the child attend online classes.....Despite all the parents signing a petition against ONLINE classes... Things haven't changed....
I hope management tries to understand the difficulties of parents too...

reviews.author: ANUSHKA SWARGAM
reviews.review_body: The worst school ….it spoiled my childhood completely. Ur child is gonna turnout into an introvert unless u r in the cream layer.this school never gives opportunities to the other average children…..and the knowledge of the faculty is also not very great…and extracurriculars?no way all u r gonna learn is how to mug up ur textbooks

reviews.author: Ninu Ahuja
reviews.review_body: We are very lucky that our son Ayushmaan got admission in D. P. S secunderabad. From the very first Call at school Reception for admission inquiry , we were so happy that all the office staff, teaching staff and Respected Principle mam were always very cooperative with us. We never felt disappointed with anything in this wonderful school. Mr Sridhar, helped us alot in everything. Reception lady Mrs Vijaya is  always smiling and helpful.  Class teacher Mrs Naga prasuna mam was always very helpful. Thanks to all the staff for taking such good care for our son.
